working: Alumni eNews - July 2026 (07-09) was the strongest recent send: +77.2% lift (daily sessions 14.5 to 25.7) with a 56.61% open rate, far above the 25-35% nonprofit benchmark.
Newsletter opens remain excellent across the board: Constant Contact avg open 51.57%, and every 2026 Alumni/Staff-Client send lands 45-57% open.
Staff-Client eNews - June 2026 (07-14) posted +17.9% lift on a 50.78% open rate, and the 07-16 Alumni reminder held a 45.81% open.
Organic Search is a healthy 33.5% of traffic (10,685 sessions) - SEO remains BCC's real growth engine behind Direct.
Email sessions ticked up 13 to 15 vs the 07-20 run as the two July 20 sends registered - small but the only Email movement all window.
not_working: UTM leakage is the headline problem: the 07-20 sends show email_sessions_3d=2 vs direct_sessions_3d=15, 07-16 shows 4 vs 35, 07-09 shows 4 vs 33. Links carry no UTM tags so GA4 mis-credits newsletter traffic as Direct (50.8%, 16,208 sessions) while Email holds just 15 sessions (0.0%) across 91 sends.
The most recent send underperformed: Staff-Client & Referring Partners eNews - July 2026 (07-20) came in at -29.5% lift with a 0.4% click rate (Staff-Client).
Click rates are weak everywhere: CC avg click 1.94%, and most 2026 sends sit at 0.4-1.2% click with click-to-open under 2% - below the ~2-3% nonprofit benchmark.
Referring Partners eNews opens (~26%) sit at the bottom of the benchmark band, well under the 45-57% Alumni/Staff sends earn.
Organic visibility is thin: GSC shows only 2 clicks on 254 impressions with an impression-weighted avg position of 21.76 (page 2-3) for tracked keywords.
do_next: Add utm_source=constantcontact&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=<send> to every newsletter link - the single highest-value fix; it will move the spike traffic now mis-booked as Direct into Email and make send ROI measurable.
Repromote Alumni-themed content: Alumni sends drive the biggest lifts (07-09 +77.2%, 06-03 +65.2%) and the highest opens (56.61%).
Shift send timing earlier in the month/mid-week: the +77.2% winner went out 07-09 while the 07-20 send posted -29.5% lift.
Rebuild CTAs on the Staff-Client eNews - Feb 2026 model, which hit a 3.85% click (vs the <1% norm), to lift the weak click rates.
SEO follow-up: tracked keywords average position 21.76 with only 2 clicks - prioritize on-page work on the 8 discovery candidates to push page-2 terms onto page 1.
summary: All three sources (GA4, Constant Contact, GSC) are live. Newsletter opens are strong (51.57% avg) but Direct still absorbs 50.8% of traffic because newsletter links lack UTM tags - Email shows just 15 sessions across 91 sends. Alumni sends remain the top lift/open performers; the 07-20 send underperformed at -29.5% lift.
